title: podman rmi IMAGENAME, for image with multiple tags, should untag
body:
Docker compatibility: when there's one image with multiple tag names, `docker rmi NAME` actually means 'untag'.  Podman does not do this, and AFAICT does not offer a way to remove a tag

    # podman pull docker.io/stackbrew/centos:7
    ....
    # podman tag !$ foo
    # podman rmi foo
    unable to delete 61b44etc (must force) - image is referred to in multiple tags

Expected behavior: success, with `podman images` no longer listing `foo latest 61b44etc` but still listing `docker.io/stackbrew/centos 7 61b44etc`

comments.body: I'm fairly certain this was working at some point - I remember reviewing code related to untagging names.

Adding more to this behavior, if we `podman rmi -f <tag>` it removes all tags for a particular image.
```
# podman images
REPOSITORY                              TAG      IMAGE ID       CREATED       SIZE
docker.io/library/alpine                latest   3fd9065eaf02   6 weeks ago   4.15MB
registry.access.redhat.com/rhel7/rhel   latest   d01d4f01d3c4   5 weeks ago   2.72kB
docker.io/library/busybox               latest   5b0d59026729   4 weeks ago   1.15MB
busybox                                 latest   5b0d59026729   4 weeks ago   1.15MB
docker.io/library/busybox               new      5b0d59026729   4 weeks ago   1.15MB

# podman rmi docker.io/library/busybox:new
unable to delete 5b0d59026729b68570d99bc4f3f7c31a2e4f2a5736435641565d93e7c25bd2c3 (must force) - image is referred to in multiple tags

# podman rmi -f docker.io/library/busybox:new
5b0d59026729b68570d99bc4f3f7c31a2e4f2a5736435641565d93e7c25bd2c3

# podman images
REPOSITORY                              TAG      IMAGE ID       CREATED       SIZE
docker.io/library/alpine                latest   3fd9065eaf02   6 weeks ago   4.15MB
registry.access.redhat.com/rhel7/rhel   latest   d01d4f01d3c4   5 weeks ago   2.72kB
```
@edsantiago this should be the case now, mind checking and closing if happy?
well most of it went into 0.3.4 but there was a bug in that, so yeah 0.3.5-1 (f27, 28)
Looks fixed. Tried f27 and f28.
